name: Chicken, Country Ham and Peas
recipeIngredient: 1/4 lb Virginia ham or prosciutto, diced at 1/2 inch
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare or defrost one batch of Fricasseed Chicken.
2. Arrange the chicken pieces in a casserole or Dutch oven and cover.
3. Place the dish in the oven and turn the temperature to 375°F.
4. Bake for 20 minutes.
5. In a medium saucepan over medium heat, combine the fricassee sauce, milk, and cloves.
6. Bring the mixture to a boil.
7. Remove from heat and pour through a fine strainer into a clean saucepan.
8. Add the diced ham and peas to the saucepan.
9. Place over medium-high heat and cook until the liquid thickens enough to coat a wooden spoon.
10. Pour the sauce, ham, and peas over the chicken.
11. Continue cooking for 5 minutes.
12. Serve the chicken and sauce in a serving bowl or on a deep serving platter, sprinkled with parsley.
13. Accompany with pasta or rice.
